reasoning: Query asks specifically about Shirakawa-go last-mile / bus-only access and train transfer timing. Tool returns generic Gifu hub list with Shirakawa-go entry having no nearest_station data and no bus-route guidance. improvement_hint: Augment get_transport with bus_routes field for spots that have no rail access; pull from MLIT bus open data or Wikidata P559 (route).

reasoning: Query is two-part: Kamogawa evening stroll + reasonable ryokan. get_spots returns Kamogawa-related entries but no hotel layer. canonical_iconic_landmarks block surfaces Kiyomizu / Kinkakuji etc which are not Kamogawa-relevant. reasoning: Arabic query about Nara local specialty food. Response routes correctly to get_local_specialty with lang=ar; returns 三輪素麺 with Arabic translation and brand-meat canonical block. localization_directive present. Only 1 GI item — Nara has more food specialties potentially missing (柿の葉寿司, 葛, 茶粥). Rule D not violated.

improvement_hint: Add scraped 郷土料理 layer for Nara non-GI items; expand canonical_local_food block beyond brand-meat.

reasoning: search_area returns 56 matches but top results are nav-chrome municipal pages (観光・文化・スポーツ, 多文化共生, バナー広告募集) not peace-education sites. Peace Memorial Park, A-Bomb Dome, National Peace Memorial Hall buried deep. Rule B: ranking failure dominant. Family / accessibility constraint partially served by entity types but not surfaced.

reasoning: Query asks if Nagasaki tram can cover main sights; response returns prefecture hubs with nearest JR stations (not tram). Glover Garden / Dejima / Megane bridge listed but station = Nagasaki Station 14-26 min walk, omitting that they are 1-2 min from tram stops. Authoritative but mismatched to user intent.
missing_data: Nagasaki tram (長崎電気軌道) stop names per spot, day-pass info
wrong_data: Walk minutes from JR Nagasaki Station overstate actual access — tram is the real mode

reasoning: Query asks for October sakura nationwide — a true edge case (十月桜 / 子福桜 / 不断桜). Response returns endangered folk festivals + hanabi + Wikipedia hanabi list. No October-blooming cherry data surfaced. Constraint (季節=10月, target=桜) entirely ignored. Rule B: constraint failure dominant.
missing_data: 十月桜 / 冬桜 / 子福桜 / 河津桜 (early) variety entries with bloom calendars
wrong_data: Response treats query as festival query, not flora-phenology query

reasoning: Matsushima entry present with Matsushima-Kaigan station (JR, 26 min walk noted). User asks specifically train line + one-day feasibility. Data adequate for inference but no Senseki Line line name, no journey time from Sendai. Rule C applies — authoritative-but-partial → 3 on usefulness / specificity.
missing_data: Senseki Line journey time Sendai → Matsushima-Kaigan (~40 min), one-day feasibility note
wrong_data: Matsushima-Kaigan walk_minutes=26 is to Matsushima coordinate centre — the typical visitor walks ~5 min to Zuiganji area
improvement_hint: Add line_name field to nearest_station and surface journey_time_from_prefecture_capital for top-tier spots.

reasoning: search_hybrid for 宮島 ロマンチック カップル. Top hits are Tokushima Valentine cruise, Miyagi review page, 青森ロマン館, 松山 women-trip, ロマンチック街道 (Gunma), 徳之島 — none are Miyajima. Severe ranking failure; query toponym 宮島 not anchored. Rule B applies.

reasoning: Korean query for 那智の滝. Tool routes to search_area lang=ko; localization_directive in Korean. Top hits include 那智滝 (Q1365882, Wikidata), 熊野那智大社, 那智四十八滝, 那智原始林, 那智山 — exactly the entity cluster. Heritage labels present. Score 4 on usefulness because the Korean translation is delegated to the agent (acceptable per server contract).

reasoning: Query: Kumamoto to Aso without rental car. get_transport returns Kumamoto Castle, Suizenji etc. Aso volcano absent from the hub list. Critical entity (Mt Aso / 阿蘇山) is the query target and not in the response. Rule A applies — Aso entries simply not surfaced.

reasoning: Nagano Mt Norikura query. Returns two Wikidata 乗鞍岳 entries (Q11369848, Q3133588) tagged volcano + active_volcano with safety_entity_flags=active_volcano_present. Includes Norikura-kogen scraped content. Rule E boost (cluster present) — intent 5 / specificity 5. missing_data: Norikura skyline bus schedule, summit hut info

reasoning: Shimane JR Pass + Adachi Museum query. Adachi Museum (Q865908) NOT in the hub list. Iwami Ginzan, Matsue Castle (non-JR), Mt Sanbe etc are returned. Key entity missing. Rule A — retrieval failure.

reasoning: Shiretoko UNESCO query in English. search_area returns Shiretoko National Park, Shiretoko (Q17208861) with WHS heritage tag, Shiretoko Peninsula (Q629238) with WHS tag, World Heritage Conservation Centre, Mt Shiretoko, Eight Views, plus municipal scrape content. reasoning: French query for rainy-day indoor Nara spots. Response includes Tōdai-ji, Kasuga, Hōryūji canonical + Kansai koyo + Takamatsuzuka. localization_directive in French present. reasoning: Yoshino sakura peak + historical significance query. Top result describes 下/中/上/奥千本 stages, mentions 4月上旬-中旬 / 4月中旬-下旬, UNESCO WHS, 古今和歌集, 役行者 history. DMO yoshino-kankou.jp pages included. query_intent detects cherry_blossom concept. Strong response.
